title: sesleria orbelica
intro: Sesleria orbelica, also known as Orbelian's fescue, is a type of flowering plant in the grass family, native to the Balkan Peninsula. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Sesleria orbelica include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is also used in herbal remedies, such as salves and creams, to treat various skin conditions.
